title: P≠NP Updated — BSD and Motivic Tools for GCT

analysis.object: T902: P≠NP Updated — BSD and Motivic Tools for GCT depth analysis

bsd_gct_connection.description: BSD completion gives: motivic cohomology for all E/Q, Euler system machinery, LUC chain for all ranks

gct_uses_representation.description: GCT (Mulmuley-Sohoni): representation theory obstructions for circuit complexity

euler_system_for_gct.description: Could Euler system techniques bound cohomology of complexity classes?

luc_for_pnp.description: P≠NP might be LUC-(37+?): EML-2 (circuit lower bound) <-> EML-3 (algebraic obstruction). Not identified yet.

depth_of_pnp.description: EML framework: P≠NP requires EML-2 separation (circuit lower bounds). Has EML-inf flavor (no proof found). Might be EML-3 conditional.

new_tools_from_bsd.description: BSD completion provides new motivic and Euler system tools that might assist GCT obstruction program

t902_result.description: T902: BSD provides new EML-3 tools for GCT but P≠NP remains open. Best prospect: LUC-(??) identification for P≠NP as {EML-2,EML-3} duality. T902.
t902_result.reason: P≠NP: new tools, still open. T902.

analysis.theorem: T902: P≠NP Updated — BSD and Motivic Tools for GCT (S1182).

key_theorem: T902: P≠NP Updated — BSD and Motivic Tools for GCT (S1182).
